youtube.title: YouTube Advertising
youtube.description: Authentic advertising integrated into our YouTube videos.

shorts.title: Short-Form Content
shorts.description: Fast and engaging content on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts.

training.title: Speaking & Training
training.description: We share insights on marketing, social media, investing, and entrepreneurship.

about.title: Who is
about.intro1: Kozip is one of Estonia's leading adventure entertainment channels
about.intro1Rest: , where bold experiments, exciting stories, and top-tier video production come together.
about.intro2: We don't just make videos – we create shows that people wait weeks for and watch repeatedly. Our goal is to inspire viewers with
about.intro2End: and do amazing things in their own lives.
about.intro3: Our fans aren't passive consumers but engaged thinkers who trust us like friends. For marketers, this means bringing your brand into an environment where advertising is part of an anticipated adventure, not a disruptive pause.

youtubeService.title: Advertising in
youtubeService.subtitle: YouTube video advertising is currently one of the world's most effective marketing methods.
youtubeService.whatIsMeaning: What does YouTube video advertising mean?
youtubeService.whatIsDescription: We create shows for the YouTube platform and weave advertising into their scripts, presented by the host in their own words. Thus, brand integration isn't disruptive but a natural part of the entertainment that fans trust.
youtubeService.statsAudienceDesc: Often watched by whole families together
youtubeService.statsNote: Often 1 view = friends, couples, or families watching together on the couch.
youtubeService.reason1Desc: In traditional advertising, the brand praises itself. In our videos, a creator the viewer already trusts and loves recommends you. It's like a good friend's recommendation, but reaching tens or even hundreds of thousands of people at once.
youtubeService.reason2Desc: Our video statistics confirm that 95-99% of viewers watch the advertising segment in its entirety.
youtubeService.reason2DescRest: This is a drastic difference compared to Meta ads, which are mostly ignored, or TV commercials, during which people grab their phones.
youtubeService.reason3Desc: We create timeless content. Our videos are discovered and enjoyed years after publication – just like favorite movies. Your investment doesn't guarantee momentary visibility but lasting value that works for you for years.
youtubeService.selectProjects: Select projects from the admin panel to display them here.

shortsService.title: Advertising in
shortsService.subtitle: A short video with us is a quick and effective way to introduce your product to nearly 100,000 potential customers.
shortsService.whatIsMeaning: What does short video advertising mean?
shortsService.whatIsDescription: We create an engaging short video (45-120 seconds) in which we introduce our viewers to our partner's product/service, and post it across 5 Kozip platforms to maximize the video's reach (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, and Snapchat).
shortsService.reason1Desc: We've built a relationship with our followers for years, so they genuinely trust and listen to us and our opinions.
shortsService.reason2Desc: When a brand talks about itself, it's perceived as advertising. But when we talk about a brand, it's an authentic and personal recommendation for the viewer.
shortsService.reason3Desc: We don't need hand-holding or lengthy instructions – your goal is enough. Send us the product and watch the numbers grow while you focus on other things.

trainingService.title: We share our knowledge
trainingService.titleHighlight: on stage and in training rooms.
trainingService.subtitle: We help bring energy to your event by hosting with flair or sharing practical knowledge in areas we work with daily. We're a partner for event organizers looking for a charismatic duo to perform, and for companies wanting to develop their team in our areas of expertise.
trainingService.service1Desc: We create a complete atmosphere and maintain the event's rhythm.
trainingService.service2Desc: We share our knowledge and experiences through engaging presentations. For example, about entrepreneurship, content creation, or investing.
trainingService.service3Desc: We share our knowledge with companies in social media, content creation, and marketing.

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.subtitle: Have an idea for collaboration? Write to us, and if your brand aligns with Kozip's values, we might create something truly amazing together!
contactPage.messageSentDesc: Thanks for your message! We received it and will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.errorMissingFields: Please make sure you've filled in all required fields (name, email, and message).
contactPage.errorEmailFailed: Unfortunately there was a technical error sending the message. Please try again later or contact us directly at info@kozip.ee.
contactPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us at info@kozip.ee.

youtubeComparison.veryHighTrust: Viewer trusts the creator like a "friend". The recommendation is authentic.
youtubeComparison.veryHighAttention: The ad is part of the content. Therefore 95-99% watch the ad in full
youtubeComparison.yearsDesc: The video stays on YouTube and accumulates views for years to come.
youtubeComparison.standardDesc: Official, but viewers are used to ignoring it as "typical sales noise"
youtubeComparison.veryLowDesc: During breaks, people go to the kitchen, change channels, or grab their phone.
youtubeComparison.campaignTimeDesc: You get visibility only as long as you pay for airtime
youtubeComparison.mediumDesc: The brand talks about how good it is
youtubeComparison.lowDesc: Most people scroll past ads in seconds
youtubeComparison.temporaryDesc: The ad disappears from the news feed as soon as the campaign budget runs out.
